title: Evangelion interactive DVD
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion interactive DVD?             Quote Post by Axell » Tue May 12, 2009 12:27 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WOZNF8qCvCI&feature=channel been skimming through this video as well as part 2, didnt search for 3, but my moonspeak is not good enough to tell me all that is happening. What is this and what is going on?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue May 12, 2009 6:14 am I have this DVD. It's based on the original SEGA NGE game, with a rather lame new Angel and Shinji has amnesia: http://homepage.mac.com/csf2860/kiss.wmv The Three Stooges are a band, and it seems that Hikari is a pretty good singer: http://homepage.mac.com/csf2860/Lamers.mov http://homepage.mac.com/csf2860/Ai_Evangelion.mov

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue May 12, 2009 11:00 am For the sake of archival, this is a pretty cool find. I imagine that the original Saturn game is quite rare by now, and with Saturn emulation still in its infancy (that system's internal architecture was a real B), this DVD is probably the only access most people will have to the new footage that was made for the game. Anyone suppose there's going to be some form of a fanslation of this anytime soon, or at least for the footage? I know it's been a few years and I'm still waiting for a translation of Iron Maiden 2, so I guess I shouldn't get my hopes up, but still... At least this is something any bloke with Sony Vegas and a knowledge of the Japanese language can tackle, with no programming involved...

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue May 12, 2009 12:18 pm did Shinji just, kiss,......but......its Shinji........Shinji isnt that sort of guy.....WHAT?!?!?!?!?! and lol and Shinji on the piano

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue May 12, 2009 12:22 pm Haha. I love Hikari's reaction.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 12, 2009 4:23 pm The interactive DVD is of First Impression. (Why they never bothered releasing Second Impression with Mayumi in a similar manner is beyond me.) Last I checked at CD Japan, it's Out of Print which sucks because I was thinking of buying it at some point. o(>__<)O There's another thread about it here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4867 (Although that's about First and Second Impression.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 12, 2009 5:04 pm There is no "First Impression". The first game is rather blandly titled "Neon Genesis Evangelion", unless I'm terribly mistaken.

[]:             Quote Post by Joppu » Fri May 22, 2009 4:52 pm I love the massive amounts of reused animation

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri May 22, 2009 5:07 pm Hey, at least it has animation, unlike some other Evangelion offshoots. [cough]Iron Maiden series[/cough]

[]:             Quote Post by Joppu » Fri May 22, 2009 5:12 pm Timstuff wrote: Hey, at least it has animation, unlike some other Evangelion offshoots. [cough]Iron Maiden series[/cough]

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri May 22, 2009 6:15 pm Looks like it's a stalemate then.

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Fri May 22, 2009 7:48 pm I like how Hikari's voice magically ages to adulthood once she starts singing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 03, 2009 5:38 pm Late reply is late: Apparently Yoko Takahashi ( Yeah, the singer for the Eva opening @_@ ) is the one singing. Sucks this DVD is out of print according to CD Japan, it sounds like an amusing thing to have. (From what I've seen of the clips at least.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 03, 2009 10:01 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Apparently Yoko Takahashi ( Yeah, the singer for the Eva opening @_@ ) is the one singing.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 04, 2009 9:08 am Reichu wrote: There is no "First Impression". The first game is rather blandly titled "Neon Genesis Evangelion", unless I'm terribly mistaken.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 04, 2009 1:07 pm Reichu: The CDJapan page (before the DVD went out of print) said this as the singer: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KIBA-1013 (Just Hikari.) Also: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=168416#168416[/url], I wrote: Shin-Seiki wrote: According to Reichu, that's not Junko Iwao, it's the same singer as does 'Tamashi no Refrain'.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Jun 04, 2009 5:29 pm I had assumed back when I first got the DVD that that was Junko Iwao singing, but Reichu insisted that it was Yoko Takahashi (I was like 'Yoko who?'). However, ANN doesn't list it under Junko's staff credits, and the only Google return for "Yoko Takahashi" +"Ai no Evangelion" is this very thread

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Mar 21, 2011 6:07 pm Wow, this is... interesting? Disturbing? I really have no idea. Except to say, who got their 70s Hanna-Barbara cartoon in my Evangelion ??
